hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD="$TOOL_INPUT"; for PATTERN in "rm -rf /" "rm -rf ~" ":(){ :|:& };:" "mkfs" "dd if=" "> /dev/sda"; do [[ "$CMD" == *"$PATTERN"* ]] && echo "BLOCK: Destructive command detected: $PATTERN" && exit 2; done; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT"; case "$FILE" in *.env|*.env.*|*/.env|*/.env.*) echo "BLOCK: Cannot write to .env files" && exit 2;; *secrets/*|*credentials*|*.pem|*.key) echo "BLOCK: Cannot write to secrets/credential files" && exit 2;; esac; exit 0'
hooks.description: Prevent writing to sensitive files (.env, secrets, credentials, keys)

hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT"; case "$FILE" in */.ssh/*|*id_rsa*|*id_ed25519*) echo "BLOCK: Cannot read SSH keys" && exit 2;; *.env|*.env.*|*/.env|*/.env.*) echo "BLOCK: Cannot read .env files" && exit 2;; esac; exit 0'
hooks.description: Prevent reading SSH keys and .env files

hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT"; case "$FILE" in */.claude/*|*/hooks/*) echo "[WARN] Security-sensitive file modified: $FILE — run: npx ecc-agentshield scan";; esac; exit 0'
hooks.description: Warn when security-sensitive config files are modified

hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT"; case "$FILE" in */.claude/*|*/hooks/*) echo "[WARN] Security-sensitive file modified: $FILE — run: npx ecc-agentshield scan";; esac; exit 0'
hooks.description: Warn when security-sensitive config files are edited

hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "[Session End] Reminder: verify all changes are committed and tests pass."'
